module_info.docstring:
Adapter for token usage tracking in llm-docs.
Updated with accurate pricing models and direct extraction from API responses.

functions.name: get_provider_from_model
functions.docstring: Determine the provider from the model string.

functions.name: get_base_model_name
functions.docstring: Extract the base model name from a full model string.

functions.name: get_pricing_for_model
functions.docstring: Get pricing information for a model.

functions.name: update_aisuite_response_tracking
functions.docstring:
Track token usage from an aisuite response with updated pricing.

Args:
    response: The response from aisuite
    task: Description of the task being performed
    prompt_tokens: Optional manual count of prompt tokens
    model: Optional model string if not available in response

functions.name: print_usage_report
functions.docstring: Print the usage report with accurate pricing.

functions.name: get_usage_summary
functions.docstring: Get the usage summary with enhanced cost information.

functions.name: get_browser_use_vision_cost
functions.docstring:
Calculate the cost of vision API calls for browser-use.

Args:
    num_images: Number of images processed
    model: Model used (default: gpt-4o)
    
Returns:
    Estimated cost in USD
